theme.label: Appearance
theme.systemTip: Clear manual selection and follow system
theme.desc: Defaults to system theme. Choose Purple, Deep Blue, or Black to lock it across restarts.
newChat.title: New Chat (Ctrl+N)
chat.placeholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline, @ for Skills, # for Tools)
chat.placeholderPaused: Type instructions to continue, or describe next step…
tools.hint: Click a tool to view details. Call limits & LLM turn limits are in Advanced settings.
braveSearch.title: Web Search (Brave Search API)
braveSearch.desc: Free signup: brave.com/search/api (2000 queries/month free). Falls back to DuckDuckGo if unconfigured.
chromePath.title: Browser Tool (Chrome Path)
chromePath.desc: Optional. Auto-detects system Chrome/Edge. Provide full path to chrome.exe if auto-detection fails.
workspaceDir.desc: Default directory for Agent scripts and temp files. Bash commands run here. Leave empty for default.
autoMemory.desc: Auto-saves to long-term memory when keywords like "remember" are detected. You can still use memory_save manually when off.
perf.title: ⚡ Performance
agentLoop.title: 🔁 Agent Loop Limit
perf.bashDefaultHint: Total timeout for foreground bash commands. Min 5s, default 5 min. Won't interrupt while output flows; triggers only when total time exceeds limit.
perf.idleTimeoutHint: Terminates command if no stdout/stderr output for this duration. Set 0 to disable. Default 2 min.
perf.maxTimeoutHint: Absolute maximum for a single bash command to prevent LLM passing huge timeout_ms. Default 30 min.
agentLoop.toolLimitHint: Max tool calls per task. Default 50, increase for large projects (e.g. 200-300). Max 500.
agentLoop.llmLimitHint: Max LLM turns per task. Default 50, usually keep default. Tool call limit is the more common bottleneck. Max 500.
proxy.desc: HTTP proxy may be needed to access GitHub Copilot API from certain regions.
quota.title: Monthly Request Quota
quota.hint: No quota configured. Add one in each model's management drawer.
quota.ruleHint: Configure quota rules in each model's management drawer
provider.configHint: Please configure any Provider. It will activate upon saving.
model.auto: Auto (selects model based on query complexity)
model.autoHint: Simple → lightweight model, Normal → standard model, Complex → strongest model
model.fixedHint: All messages will use the selected model below
chat.pausePending: Waiting for current tool to finish before pausing
mem.importConfirm:
About to import {n} memories (merge mode, duplicates skipped).

Continue?
crew.title: Crews
crew.name: Name
crew.descPlaceholder: Describe what this Crew does in one sentence
crew.sysPromptPlaceholder: Custom instructions appended after default System Prompt…
crew.empty: No Crews yet. Click the button above to create one
